## Proposed changes

Describe the big picture of your changes here to communicate to the maintainers why we should accept this pull request. If it fixes a bug or resolves a feature request, be sure to link to that issue.

### Type of change(s)

What types of changes does your code introduce to Beaver Notes?
_Put an `x` in the boxes that apply_

- [ ] Bugfix(es) (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature(s) (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change(s) (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation Update(s) (if none of the other choices apply)
- [ ] None of the above (please describe below)

### Checklist

_Put an `x` in the boxes that apply. You can also fill these out after creating the PR. If you're unsure about any of them, don't hesitate to ask. We're here to help! This is simply a reminder of what we are going to look for before merging your code._

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/Beaver-Notes/Beaver-Notes/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have signed all my commits (this can be done retroactively, see [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://github.com/Beaver-Notes/Beaver-Notes/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin))
- [ ] [Lint](https://github.com/Beaver-Notes/Beaver-Notes/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#linting) and test pass locally
- [ ] Are **translations** updated (if applicable)?
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)

## Further comments

If this is a relatively large or complex change, kick off the discussion by explaining why you chose the solution you did and what alternatives you considered, etc...
